violations.text: Allergy statement is lacking on the "Catering" menu. Allergy statement to be added. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Raw animal foods (shaved steak) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cut vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Bottle was refilled with adequate ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Various foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking all the required information on the label. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (sub-ingredients), allergens. the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Proper labeling guidelines reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was Correct By: 02/19/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer was dumped and replaced with a sanitizer of adequate ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach and quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
